name: paper-reading-toolkit
description: Codex toolkit for academic paper reading, structured research, Markdown formatting, and Obsidian Academic Research archiving.

interface.shortDescription: Read papers, run research, and archive notes to Obsidian.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin that bundles a paper-reading workflow: deep paper analysis, structured research pipelines, clearer Markdown output, and Obsidian Academic Research note routing.
defaultPrompt: Use deep-dive to read this paper and connect it to my notes.
Archive this paper discussion to Obsidian Academic Research.
Turn these research results into a Chinese Markdown report.
